rows.speaker: A
rows.english: What are all the subjects available  there ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.roman: ella ive. nim hudugange yaav gruup beeku ?
rows.english: All are available.  What  group does your boy want ?

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: He wants the science group.

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: Does he not want Commerce ?

rows.speaker: A
rows.roman: beeda, avange kaamarsu istg illa. sainsee tumba ista.
rows.english: No, he doesn't like Commerce, he likes science too much.

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: If he wants science, does he like mathematics ?

rows.speaker: A
rows.roman: haudu, avange aaljiibra. jaamitri andre huccu.
rows.english: Yes. he is mad after algebra and geometry.

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: If so, it is o k.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Now where did you come from ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: From Tanjavur.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Do you know Tamil ?

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: I know very well, that is my mother tongue.

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: Don't know you Kannada ?

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Not even a bit.

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: What other language do you know ?

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: I know English and a little Telugu too.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Do you like music ?

rows.speaker: A
rows.roman: sangiita yaarigh isto illa ! nanguu tumba ista. viine nudistiini,
rows.english: Who does not like music ?   I also like it.   I play on the Veena.

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: Don't you like Violin ?

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: I like it but I am crazy about the Veena from my childhood.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Do you practise everyday ?

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Yes.  I practise it early in the morning everyday.
one person
people
mother tongue
music
